channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In Ebola epicenter, gold-mining town reacts with fear, disbelief and grit
item.description: NPR reports from Mongbwalu, DRC, where the fight against Ebola faces supply shortages and skeptical residents.

item.title: Five years after Surfside condo collapse, tragedy's toll endures
item.description: Surfside, Florida, marks five years since a condo collapse killed 98 people, one of the worst structural failures in U.S. history.

item.title: Four ways to plan an ideal summer, according to a happiness expert
item.description: Gretchen Rubin, host of the Happier podcast, offers exercises to help you make the most of the season. Fill out the p...

item.title: Appeals court allows Trump administration to expand use of expedited deportations
item.description: A federal appeals court on Tuesday permitted the Trump administration to resume expedited deportations of undocumented migrants across the...
